glosses.ja: 設立する; 創立する

sentences.target: Ich will eine kleine Firma gründen.

translations.de: Ich will eine kleine Firma gründen.
translations.en: I want to start a small company.
translations.fr: Je veux créer une petite entreprise.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn mở một công ty nhỏ.
translations.nl: Ik wil een klein bedrijf beginnen.
translations.hi: मैं एक छोटी कंपनी शुरू करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να ανοίξω μια μικρή εταιρεία.
translations.nb: Jeg vil starte et lite firma.
translations.id: Saya ingin memulai sebuah perusahaan kecil.
translations.sv: Jag vill starta ett litet företag.
translations.ro: Vreau să deschid o firmă mică.
translations.da: Jeg vil starte en lille virksomhed.
translations.ja: 小さな会社を立ち上げたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects the infinitive 'gründen'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object noun.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular with weak inflection (-e); modifies 'Firma'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'gründen'.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir möchten einen Verein im Viertel gründen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmœçtən ˈaɪ̯nən fɛˈʁaɪ̯n ɪm ˈfɪʁtl̩ ˈɡʁʏndən/

translations.de: Wir möchten einen Verein im Viertel gründen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmœçtən ˈaɪ̯nən fɛˈʁaɪ̯n ɪm ˈfɪʁtl̩ ˈɡʁʏndən/
translations.en: We would like to start a club in the neighborhood.
translations.es: Nos gustaría crear un club en el barrio.
translations.fr: Nous aimerions créer un club dans le quartier.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想在社区成立一个社团。
translations.yue: 我哋想喺社區成立一個社團。
translations.ru: Мы хотим создать клуб в нашем районе.
translations.pt: Gostaríamos de criar um clube no bairro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn lập một câu lạc bộ trong khu phố.
translations.nl: We willen een club in de buurt oprichten.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо створити клуб у нашому районі.
translations.hu: Egy klubot szeretnénk alapítani a környéken.
translations.hi: हम मोहल्ले में एक क्लब शुरू करना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Chcielibyśmy założyć klub w naszej okolicy.
translations.el: Θα θέλαμε να δημιουργήσουμε έναν σύλλογο στη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Vi vil starte en klubb i nabolaget.
translations.id: Kami ingin mendirikan sebuah klub di lingkungan kami.
translations.sv: Vi vill starta en klubb i kvarteret.
translations.ro: Am vrea să înființăm un club în cartier.
translations.cs: Chtěli bychom založit klub v naší čtvrti.
translations.da: Vi vil starte en klub i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 近所でサークルを作りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; functions as the subject.
Modal auxiliary in Konjunktiv II (polite), present, 1st person plural; selects the infinitive 'gründen'.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Verein'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'gründen'.
Preposition meaning 'in'; contraction of 'in dem' (in + the). Introduces a dative PP of location.
Common noun, neuter dative singular governed by 'im'; denotes location.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'möchten'.

sentences.target: Sie will bald eine Familie gründen.

translations.de: Sie will bald eine Familie gründen.
translations.en: She wants to start a family soon.
translations.es: Ella quiere formar una familia pronto.
translations.fr: Elle veut fonder une famille bientôt.
translations.ko: 그녀는 곧 가정을 꾸리고 싶어 해요.
translations.pt: Ela quer formar uma família em breve.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn sớm lập gia đình.
translations.nl: Ze wil binnenkort een gezin stichten.
translations.hi: वह जल्द ही परिवार बसाना चाहती है.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să întemeieze o familie în curând.
translations.ja: 彼女は近いうちに家族を持ちたいと思っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; functions as the subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive.
Temporal adverb indicating proximity in time.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Familie'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'gründen'.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

sentences.target: Meine Freunde wollen zusammen eine Band gründen.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔʏ̯ndə ˈvɔlən tsuˈzamən ˈaɪ̯nə bɛnt ˈɡʁʏndən/

translations.de: Meine Freunde wollen zusammen eine Band gründen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔʏ̯ndə ˈvɔlən tsuˈzamən ˈaɪ̯nə bɛnt ˈɡʁʏndən/
translations.en: My friends want to start a band together.
translations.es: Mis amigos quieren formar una banda juntos.
translations.fr: Mes amis veulent monter un groupe ensemble.
translations.it: I miei amici vogliono mettere su un gruppo insieme.
translations.ko: 내 친구들은 함께 밴드를 결성하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友们想一起组个乐队。
translations.yue: 我啲朋友想一齊組樂隊。
translations.ru: Мои друзья хотят вместе создать группу.
translations.pt: Meus amigos querem formar uma banda juntos.
translations.he: החברים שלי רוצים להקים להקה יחד.
translations.tr: Arkadaşlarım birlikte bir grup kurmak istiyor.
translations.vi: Bạn bè tôi muốn cùng nhau lập một ban nhạc.
translations.nl: Mijn vrienden willen samen een band beginnen.
translations.uk: Мої друзі хочуть разом створити гурт.
translations.hu: A barátaim együtt szeretnének zenekart alapítani.
translations.hi: मेरे दोस्त मिलकर एक बैंड शुरू करना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Moi przyjaciele chcą razem założyć zespół.
translations.el: Οι φίλοι μου θέλουν να φτιάξουν ένα συγκρότημα μαζί.
translations.nb: Vennene mine vil starte et band sammen.
translations.id: Teman-teman saya ingin membentuk sebuah band bersama.
translations.sv: Mina vänner vill starta ett band tillsammans.
translations.ro: Prietenii mei vor să formeze o trupă împreună.
translations.cs: Moji přátelé chtějí spolu založit kapelu.
translations.da: Mine venner vil starte et band sammen.
translations.ja: 友だちは一緒にバンドを組みたいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, plural nominative; modifies the subject 'Freunde'.
Common noun, plural nominative; functions as the subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person plural; selects the infinitive.
Adverb indicating joint action; modifies the predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object 'Band'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular (music group); direct object of 'gründen'.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'wollen'.
